body.title: CC+/CC- causal rework tally in slate and context-load
body.text:
# D-cc-plus-minus-scoring-2026-05-05
**title:** CC+/CC- causal rework tally in slate and context-load
**date:** 2026-05-05
**status:** open
**spawned_tickets:** T-cc-plus-minus-slate, T-cc-plus-minus-fixit-tag

## Decision narrative
Add a lightweight causal rework tally to the slate: CC+ when rework is caused by a design change (not Claude's fault), CC- when caused by a gap in Claude's work. Tagged at /fixit time via a one-question prompt. Injected at session start by context-load as 'Current slate: CC+ N / CC- N' plus last 3 events. The naming-in-moment mechanic (not a complex score) creates accountability at the right decision time. docs/working_together.md updated to document the mechanism.

## Rollup

**Closed at:** 2026-05-05T21:28:54.667563+00:00
**Ticket count:** 2 (all closed)

### Shipped via
- T-cc-plus-minus-slate (S) — CLOSED: CC+/CC- causal rework tally in slate + context-load injection  `done` — CC tally added to context-load Step 5.8; working_together.md updated with CC+/CC- mechanism; pushed to UnseenUniversity
- T-cc-plus-minus-fixit-tag (S) — DESIGNED: CC+/CC- tagging prompt in /fixit  `done` — added CC+/CC- tagging Step 0 to /fixit — asks classification before /decided fires, appends to slate ## CC score

_Generated by cc_queue.py _decision_rollup. File-stub until T-decisions-into-palace-subtree moves rollups into the memory palace._

## Provenance
Absorbed from the TheIgors.archive lineage 2026-06-28 (D-all-generations-consolidation-2026-06-28). Historical record; original status: open.
